response.justification: The candidate has extensive fullstack experience with strong TypeScript, React, and Nest.js proficiency, alongside relational database knowledge. Their background includes scalable system development, API integration, and clean architecture practices, which align well with the role's requirements. However, their recent experience leans more toward senior-level roles, which may overshadow the entry-level expectations.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and fullstack development experience across multiple projects
Proven ability to work with scalable systems, APIs, and databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB)
Strong portfolio demonstrating clean software architecture and team collaboration
concerns: Overqualified for an entry-level role with senior-level titles and responsibilities
Limited recent experience with React/Nest.js (current role focuses on AI-agent infrastructure)
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with remote-first experience

key_factors.factor: Scalable system and API integration experience
